# headers-and-attrs

otlp.address, insecure->tlsEnabled invert, headers (=) and attrs (:) KV maps

!!! tip "Direction: `roundtrip`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `roundtrip` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/otlp/headers-and-attrs` |

## Input

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
data:
  otlp.address: collector:4317
  otlp.insecure: "true"
  otlp.headers: "Authorization=Bearer x,X-Scope=prod"
  otlp.attrs: "service.name:argocd,env:prod"
  otlp.sample.ratio: "0.1"
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  commitServer: {}
  controller: {}
  otlp:
    address: collector:4317
    attrs:
      env: prod
      service.name: argocd
    headers:
      Authorization: Bearer x
      X-Scope: prod
    sampleRatio: "0.1"
    tlsEnabled: false
  repoServer: {}
  server: {}
```

## Expected ConfigMaps

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  otlp.address: collector:4317
  otlp.attrs: env:prod,service.name:argocd
  otlp.headers: Authorization=Bearer x,X-Scope=prod
  otlp.insecure: "true"
  otlp.sample.ratio: "0.1"
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-rbac-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-rbac-cm
  namespace: argocd
```
